tagline: Trusted Pool Care in Palm Beach Since 2012

hero.headline: Palm Beach Pools Done The Right Way
hero.subheadline: For 14 years, Andy Brody and his team have kept Palm Beach pools sparkling clean and running perfectly. From weekly maintenance to full equipment repairs, we treat every pool like our own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From routine cleanings to complex equipment repairs, Palm Beach Pool & Spa Services handles it all so you never have to worry about your pool again.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly service including skimming, vacuuming, brushing, chemical balancing, and filter checks. Your pool stays swim-ready every single day.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, salt systems — we service Jandy, Hayward, Pentair, Zodiac, and Raypak. Most repairs done same-visit.

cards.title: Pool Heater Services
cards.description: Expert diagnosis, repair, and installation of pool heating systems so you can swim comfortably year-round in Palm Beach.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Advanced techniques to pinpoint hidden leaks before they cause costly structural damage. Fast detection, permanent fixes.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Resurfacing
cards.description: Diamond Brite, Pebble Tec, Florida Gem finishes plus tile work, lighting, and automation to transform your backyard oasis.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive safety and efficiency inspections for home buyers, seasonal startups, or peace of mind. Detailed written reports included.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. Andy will personally review your request and get back to you within 24 hours with an honest, no-pressure quote.

steps.title: We Show Up & Get It Done
steps.description: Our licensed technicians arrive on schedule with everything needed. Every job is overseen by owner Andy Brody to ensure top-quality results.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, perfectly balanced, and ready for a swim. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right — free.

about.label: Why Palm Beach Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated. Every Job. Every Time.
about.description: Palm Beach Pool & Spa Services was founded in 2012 by Andy Brody with a simple belief: pool owners deserve honest communication, reliable service, and someone who actually cares. With over 243 five-star reviews and 14 years of serving Palm Beach County, we have earned the trust of homeowners from Jupiter to Wellington. Andy personally oversees every job because your pool deserves that level of attention.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Andy Brody personally oversees every service call. You are never handed off to a random subcontractor.

features.title: Transparent, Honest Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no upselling. We quote fair prices and stick to them every time.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with any visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. That is our commitment to every Palm Beach client.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Honest quotes upfront. No hidden fees, no contracts — just dependable pool care at a fair price.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call Andy directly. We will return and make it right at no additional cost — no questions asked, no runaround. Your satisfaction is not just a promise; it is how we have earned 243 five-star reviews.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent issues like green pools or equipment failures, we offer same-day and next-day service. Just call Andy directly and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our Palm Beach clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will receive a summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What brands of pool equipment do you service?
faqs.answer: We service all major brands including Jandy, Hayward, Pentair, Zodiac, and Raypak. Whether it is a pump, heater, filter, or automation system, our team has the expertise and parts to get it fixed right.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Palm Beach Pool & Spa Services is a Florida State Licensed Pool Contractor and fully insured. We have been serving the Palm Beach community since 2012 with an impeccable safety and service record.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle pools for HOAs, condo communities, fitness centers, and commercial properties across Palm Beach County. Commercial clients receive dedicated scheduling and detailed monthly reporting.

testimonials.name: Jan D.
testimonials.text: He showed up, took complete ownership of the problem and got our pool looking good again in a short amount of time. Could not be happier with the service.

testimonials.name: Rhicel P.
testimonials.text: Andy is the best! He is always on time, and communicates very well regarding any pool needs. Highly recommend to anyone in the Palm Beach area.

testimonials.name: Erica B.
testimonials.text: Excellent work and quick to respond! Very happy with his work thus far and will continue to use him. Finally found a pool company we can trust.
